channel.title: My Blog on Ls's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in My Blog on Ls's Blog

item.title: Neurological diseases
item.description: Autism Spectrum Disorder 自闭症谱系障碍（Autism Spectrum Disorder, ASD）是一类复杂的神经发育障碍，其核心特征表现为社交沟通缺陷和重复刻板行为。在过去的二十年里，认知神经科学领域借助静息态功能磁共振成像技术，将 ASD 视为一种连接障碍（disconnection syndrome），并取得了长足的进步。大规模开放数据集，特别是自闭症脑影像数据交换计划（Autism Brain Imaging Data Exchange，ABIDE），极大地推动了这一进程。ABIDE I 和 ABIDE II 整合了全球数十个站点的数千名被试数据，为研究 ASD 的神经生物学基础提供了前所未有的统计功效和可复现性。 Spatiotemporal Research 1. Static Functional Connectivity 揭示了 ASD 患者在默认模式网络、突显网络和感觉运动网络等多个脑系统中的连接异常 假定大脑区域间相关性恒定，忽略了大脑活动的内在动态特性。 2. Functional Gradient ASD 患者的主功能梯度呈现出一种压缩的模式，本应处于层级最高端的跨模态区域（如默认模式网络和额顶控制网络）的梯度值显著降低，而本应处于层级最低端的感觉运动区域的梯度值则略微升高。 Challenges ASD 是一个高度异质的谱系障碍，将所有患者视作同质群体可能会掩盖重要的亚型特征差异，需要结合临床分型、基因信息或使用数据驱动方法进行进一步识别与分类。 权威 ABIDE 数据来自多个站点，扫描参数等差异会引入显著效应，需要尽力矫正。

item.title: My First Blog Post
item.description: Welcome to My Blog This is my first blog post created with Hugo and PaperMod theme.

item.title: Research Draft on Cognitive Neuroscience
item.description: Functional Connectivity and its Generation Methods Reference: Richards, B. A., Lillicrap, T. P., Beaudoin, P., Bengio, Y., Bogacz, R., Christensen, A., … & Kording, K. P. (2019). A deep learning framework for neuroscience. Nature neuroscience, 22(11), 1761-1770. Liu, Y., Seguin, C., Tian, Y. E., Di Biase, M. A., & Zalesky, A. (2025). Deep generation of personalized connectomes based on individual attributes. Medical Image Analysis, 103761. To be continued… Permutation Test 置换检验（Permutation Test）是一种基于随机重排的非参数检验方法，其核心逻辑是：

item.title: About Me
item.description: About Me Personal Introduction Hello, I am [Your Name], and this is my personal blog. Here, I will share my thoughts, experiences, and knowledge. My Interests Programming and Technology Reading Traveling Photography Music Professional Skills Programming Languages: [List your familiar programming languages] Frameworks and Tools: [List your familiar frameworks and tools] Other Skills: [List other relevant skills] Education Background [Degree] - [School Name] - [Year] [Degree] - [School Name] - [Year] Work Experience [Position] - [Company Name] - [Time Period] [Position] - [Company Name] - [Time Period] Contact Information Email: your.
